name: twilio-voicebot
description: Twilio voice call scheduler with web UI and text-to-speech

scripts.start: node -e "const f=require('fs');const j=process.env.GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON;if(j){f.writeFileSync(process.env.GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS||'/tmp/gcloud-key.json',j);console.log('wrote gcloud key')}" && node src/server.js
scripts.dev: node -e "const f=require('fs');const j=process.env.GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON;if(j){f.writeFileSync(process.env.GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS||'/tmp/gcloud-key.json',j);console.log('wrote gcloud key')}" && nodemon src/server.js
